headline: FAF Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates on Commercial Strength
summary: First American tops Q1 earnings estimates as Title segment strength and higher premiums drive revenue growth, offset partly by rising expenses.

headline: Chubb Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
